table.noDataDescription: Create a new branch to get started.

delete.title: Branch deleted successfully
delete.description: The branch has been deleted correctly
delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this branch?

welcome.title: Welcome to the Branches module
welcome.description: In this module you can manage system branches. This guide will show you the main features available.

toolbar.title: Main actions
toolbar.description: Here you can search branches, add individually, perform bulk upload from Excel or download the list in Excel format.

table.title: Branches table
table.description: The table shows all registered branches. Use the edit or delete buttons to manage each branch.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Use these controls to navigate between pages and adjust the number of records displayed.

welcome.title: Basic Information
welcome.description: In this tab you can view and edit the main data of the branch: code, name, address, time zone and associated companies.

basicInfo.title: Branch data
basicInfo.description: Code, name, phone, physical address, time zone, associated companies and branch active status.

welcome.title: Geolocation
welcome.description: Configure geofences to define the authorized marking areas for this branch.

geolocation.title: Geofence map
geolocation.description: Search for addresses to add points on the map and define the radius of each geofence. Markings will only be valid within these areas.

welcome.title: Attendance Parameters
welcome.description: Configure tolerances, schedules and automatic configurations that apply to this branch's attendance.

params.title: Use branch parameters
params.description: Enable this option for the branch to use its own attendance parameters instead of the company's.

tolerances.title: Tolerances
tolerances.description: Late arrival and lunch break tolerance. Define the minutes allowed before marking tardiness.

schedules.title: Schedule configuration
schedules.description: Minutes before and after the schedule when marking is allowed.

automatic.title: Automatic configurations
automatic.description: Automatic marking and close without assigned shift.

basicInfo.title: Basic Branch Information
basicInfo.name: Name
basicInfo.isActiveDescription: Activate or deactivate the branch in the system
basicInfo.codeDescription: Unique identification code of the branch

validation.companiesRequired: Please select at least one company

geolocation.title: Geolocation Configuration
geolocation.searchPlaceholder: Enter an address to add a point on the map
geolocation.searchDescription: Search for an address to add a point on the map
geolocation.name: Name

attendanceParams.useBranchSettingsDescription: If enabled, the branch will use its own attendance parameters instead of the company's

lateArrival.label: Late Arrival Tolerance (min)
lateArrival.description: Minutes allowed for delay before marking tardiness
lateArrival.note: If the entry time is 09:00 and the tolerance is 10 minutes, a mark at 09:08 will be considered on time, but a mark at 09:11 will be considered tardiness.

lunchBreak.label: Lunch Break Tolerance (min)
lunchBreak.description: Additional minutes allowed for lunch time
lunchBreak.note: If lunch time is from 13:00 to 14:00 and the tolerance is 15 minutes, a return at 14:13 will be considered on time, but at 14:16 it will be tardiness.

beforeSchedule.label: Minutes Before Schedule
beforeSchedule.description: Time allowed to mark before shift start
beforeSchedule.text: If the schedule is 09:00 and 30 minutes before are allowed, a mark from 08:30 will be valid, but a mark at 08:29 will not be recorded.

afterSchedule.label: Minutes After Schedule
afterSchedule.description: Maximum time allowed to mark after schedule
afterSchedule.text: If the exit time is 18:00 and 60 minutes after are allowed, a mark until 19:00 will be valid, but after 19:00 it will not be recorded.

automaticCheckIn.label: Automatic Check-in Minutes
automaticCheckIn.description: Time for the system to automatically mark entry
automaticCheckIn.note: If set to 30 minutes, marks are automatically recorded if made within ±30 minutes of each scheduled time (entry, lunch, exit, etc.).

closeWithoutShift.label: Close Without Shift Minutes
closeWithoutShift.description: Time to close records of employees without assigned shift
closeWithoutShift.note: If there is no assigned schedule and the parameter is 480 minutes, when marking at 09:00 hrs, exit can only be marked until 17:00 hrs; after that it will not be allowed.

toast.updateSuccessDescription: The branch has been updated correctly
toast.updateErrorDescription: An error occurred while updating the branch
toast.createSuccessDescription: The branch has been created correctly

massive.title: Bulk Branch Upload

excel.title: Instructions for Excel upload:
excel.step1: Download the Excel template to see the required format
excel.step2: Fill in the branch information in the template
excel.step3: In the "Time Zone" column use the dropdown to select a valid option
excel.step4: Check the "Time Zones" sheet to see all available options
excel.step6: Verify the information and press Process

manual.title: Instructions for manual entry:
manual.step1: Click Add Row to add a new branch
manual.step2: Fill in the required fields in each row
manual.step3: You can add as many rows as needed
manual.step4: Verify the information and press Process

table.noDataDescription: Add branches manually or upload an Excel file

validation.companiesRequired: Please select at least one company

validation.error: Please select a valid time zone from the list.
validation.prompt: Select a time zone from the dropdown list.

warnings.invalidTimezones: {count} time zone(s) from Excel are not valid and have been cleared. Please select valid time zones.

formatError.title: File format error

companiesRequired.title: Error

retryCompletedSuccess.description: All failed records have been processed correctly

noFailedBranches.description: All branches have been processed successfully
